records.ety: [L. ambiguitas, fr. ambiguus: cf. F. ambiguit.]

defs: The quality or state of being ambiguous; doubtfulness or uncertainty, particularly as to the signification of language, arising from its admitting of more than one meaning; an equivocal word or expression.
quotes: No shadow of ambiguity can rest upon the course to be pursued.
The words are of single signification, without any ambiguity.
